name: cadence
description: AI-powered relationship cadence platform for BDMs

scripts.start:web: pnpm --filter @cadence/shared build && pnpm --filter @cadence/web build && pnpm --filter @cadence/web dev:stable
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cadence/shared build && pnpm --filter @cadence/api build && pnpm --filter @cadence/web build
scripts.deploy:web: pnpm --filter @cadence/shared build && pnpm --filter @cadence/web build && cd apps/web && vercel --prod
